ddls:
CREATE TABLE "symbols" (
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each EMS symbol */,
  "ansi_name" TEXT /* ANSI identifier and name for the symbol */,
  "ems_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol code used in the EMS system */,
  "relationship" TEXT /* Relationship descriptor for the symbol (e.g., similar to, new symbol) */,
  "short_name" TEXT /* Short name for the symbol */,
  "long_name" TEXT /* Long descriptive name for the symbol */,
  "approved_status" INTEGER /* Approval status of the symbol */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the symbol */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the symbol */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the symbol was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the symbol was last updated */,
  "standardization_notes" TEXT /* Notes related to the standardization of the symbol */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("symbol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "symbol_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each symbol category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Parent category ID for hierarchical categorization */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* Detailed description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_symbol_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES symbol_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "symbol_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary symbol in the relationship */,
  "related_symbol_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related symbol */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of the relationship (e.g., similar to, derived from) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the relationship */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the relationship was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_symbol_relationships_related_symbol_id FOREIGN KEY ("related_symbol_id") REFERENCES symbols ("symbol_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_symbol_relationships_symbol_id FOREIGN KEY ("symbol_id") REFERENCES symbols ("symbol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, operator, analyst) */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the symbol */,
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* ID of the symbol being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the symbol was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's session */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_symbol_id FOREIGN KEY ("symbol_id") REFERENCES symbols ("symbol_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "symbol_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version record */,
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* ID of the symbol associated with this version */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the symbol */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the symbol was updated */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  "version_author" INTEGER /* User who created the version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_symbol_versions_symbol_id FOREIGN KEY ("symbol_id") REFERENCES symbols ("symbol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "symbol_audit_trail" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit record */,
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* ID of the symbol that was changed */,
  "change_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the change made */,
  "audit_action_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the audit action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_symbol_audit_trail_symbol_id FOREIGN KEY ("symbol_id") REFERENCES symbols ("symbol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories_symbols" (
  "category_symbol_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category-symbol association */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category associated with the symbol */,
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* ID of the symbol associated with the category */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who associated the symbol with the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the association was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_symbol_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_symbols_symbol_id FOREIGN KEY ("symbol_id") REFERENCES symbols ("symbol_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_symbols_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES symbol_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id")
)
